indications.text:
TEVETEN® HCT is indicated for the treatment of hypertension. It may be used alone or in
combination with other antihypertensives such as calcium channel blockers. This fixed dose
combination is not indicated for initial therapy (see DOSAGE AND ADMINISTRATION).

initial therapy (see DOSAGE AND ADMINISTRATION).
